mnemonics.title: DES Stages
mnemonics.content: Kids Enjoy Desserts (Key Expansion, Encryption, Decryption)

mnemonics.title: DES Weaknesses
mnemonics.content: Short Keys Are Bad (Short Key Length, Weak S-Boxes, Small Block Size)

mnemonics.title: DES Encryption Steps
mnemonics.content: IPs Really Expand XORed Sub-keys (Initial Permutation, Round Function, Expansion, XOR with Sub-key)
